Short CV

Mukaddes Üçkarış completed primary and high school in Antalya. She graduated from Acıbadem Mehmet Ali Aydınlar University, Department of Physiotherapy and Rehabilitation in 2022 with a third degree.Then, she started her master's education at Acıbadem Mehmet Ali Aydınlar University Faculty of Medicine, Department of Anatomy. She is still continuing his education.
